title: HoneyPots
description: Honey potions, with effects derived from the flowers pollinated to make it
body:
[![Made for Modfest 26](https://github.com/cassiancc/Cassians-Badges/raw/refs/heads/main/cozy/ModFest-26.svg)](https://modfest.net/26)

Pots being short for Potions, of course.

This mod makes it possible for honey to grant potion effects, if bees pollinate nether wart! The resulting effect(s) are then [based on the flowers they pollinate](https://sylveon.pet/catfisj/honeypots/wiki/List-of-Flower-Effects) _after_ the nether wart.

It works completely server-sided! However, you need the client in order to:
- see the custom texture of honey potions
- have RRV and WTHIT integration

(The mod also works completely client-sided, but it doesn't do much unless you have some other way of applying potion effects to honey)

Also adds a builtin datapack `honeypots:pre_nether_potions` to make blue orchids serve the role of nether wart, allowing the creation of honey potions without the nether. All potion recipes are [definable and overridable by datapack](https://sylveon.pet/catfisj/honeypots/wiki/Custom-Recipes)!
